# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd default authorization policy for a namespace. Configure policy to handle services without explicit authorization rules. Set up default behavior for service-to-service communication. This is for our service mesh policy framework.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent linkerd policy default allow.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: linkerd_policy_default_allow


apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: default-server
  namespace: default
spec:
  port: 8080
  proxy:
    policy:
      default:
        allow:
          - kind: ServiceAccount
            name: default
            namespace: default
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-authorization-policy
  namespace: default
spec:
  targetRef:
    kind: Namespace
    name: default
  rules:
  - from:
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: default
      namespace: default
    ports:
    - port: 8080
      protocol: HTTP
  - from:
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: linkerd-destination
      namespace: linkerd
    ports:
    - port: 8080
      protocol: HTTP
  - from:
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: linkerd-proxy-injector
      namespace: linkerd
    ports:
    - port: 8080
      protocol: HTTP
  - from:
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: linkerd-identity
      namespace: linkerd
    ports:
    - port: 8080
      protocol: HTTP
  - from:
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: linkerd-tap
      namespace: linkerd
    ports:
    - port: 8080
      protocol: HTTP
  - from:
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: linkerd-ocp-identity
      namespace: linkerd
    ports:
    - port: 8080
      protocol: HTTP
  - from:
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: linkerd-ocp-identity
      namespace: linkerd
    ports:
    - port: 8080
      protocol: HTTP

    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: linkerd-identity

  - from:
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: linkerd-proxy-injector
